competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Ao Tanaka.
Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Ritsu Doan.
Yasin Ayari (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Alexander Bernhardsson (Sweden) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Alexander Isak.

events.description: 亚历山大·伯恩哈德森射正。 伊萨克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Japan. Ayase Ueda is caught offside.
Ayase Ueda (Japan) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·古德蒙森犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ao Tanaka (Japan).
Attempt blocked. Ritsu Doan (Japan) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Keito Nakamura.

events.description: 杜安律射门被封堵。 中村敬斗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Hiroki Ito (Japan).
Foul by Ao Tanaka (Japan).
Attempt missed. Daizen Maeda (Japan) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Hiroki Ito with a cross.

events.description: 前田大善射门偏出。 伊藤洋辉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Ayase Ueda (Japan).
Yukinari Sugawara (Japan) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 埃利奥特·斯特劳德犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Ayase Ueda (Japan) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Ao Tanaka (Japan).
Delay in match because of an injury Isak Hien (Sweden).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 卢卡斯·伯格瓦尔 登场，贤伊萨克 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ayase Ueda (Japan).
Ao Tanaka (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 谷口彰悟 登场，板仓滉 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Yukinari Sugawara (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Ao Tanaka.

events.description: 菅原由势射正。 田中青参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ritsu Doan (Japan).
Foul by Ao Tanaka (Japan).
Daichi Kamada (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 亚历山大·伯恩哈德森犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Ritsu Doan (Japan) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt saved. Keito Nakamura (Japan) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Daizen Maeda.

events.description: 中村敬斗射正。 前田大善参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Japan. Conceded by Jacob Widell Zetterström.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ritsu Doan (Japan).
Offside, Sweden. Alexander Isak is caught offside.
Foul by Yukinari Sugawara (Japan).
Attempt blocked. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Hiroki Ito.
First Half ends, Japan 0, Sweden 0.
Second Half begins Japan 0, Sweden 0.
Attempt missed. Ao Tanaka (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Daichi Kamada.

events.description: 田中青射门偏出。 镰田大地参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Ayumu Seko.
Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Hiroki Ito.
Attempt missed. Gustaf Lagerbielke (Sweden) header from the right side of the six yard box misses to the right. Assisted by Elliot Stroud with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 古斯塔夫·拉格比尔克射门偏出。 埃利奥特·斯特劳德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Ritsu Doan (Japan) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 埃利奥特·斯特劳德犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Japan. Daizen Maeda is caught offside.
Attempt blocked. Ayase Ueda (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Keito Nakamura.

events.description: 上田绮世射门被封堵。 中村敬斗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Daichi Kamada (Japan).
Foul by Daizen Maeda (Japan).
Attempt saved. Alexander Isak (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Zion Suzuki (Japan).
Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Zion Suzuki.

events.description: 小川幸之助 登场，上田绮世 离场
伊东纯也 登场，杜安律 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Ao Tanaka (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Handball by Daizen Maeda (Japan).
Offside, Sweden. Anthony Elanga is caught offside.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Junya Ito (Japan) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 埃利奥特·斯特劳德犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Daichi Kamada (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 亚历山大·伯恩哈德森犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Yukinari Sugawara (Japan).
Foul by Shogo Taniguchi (Japan).
Attempt blocked. Daniel Svensson (Sweden) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Lucas Bergvall.

events.description: 丹尼尔·斯文森射门被封堵。 卢卡斯·伯格瓦尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Tsuyoshi Watanabe.
Attempt missed. Victor Lindelöf (Sweden) header from very close range misses to the right. Assisted by Yasin Ayari with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 维克多·林德洛夫射门偏出。 亚辛·阿亚里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ken Sema (Sweden) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.
Foul by Hiroki Ito (Japan).
Attempt missed. Gustaf Lagerbielke (Sweden) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Yasin Ayari with a cross following a set piece situation.

events.description: 古斯塔夫·拉格比尔克射门偏出。 亚辛·阿亚里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Japan. Conceded by Gabriel Gudmundsson.
Attempt missed. Koki Ogawa (Japan) left footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Daichi Kamada with a cross.

events.description: 小川幸之助射门偏出。 镰田大地参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Daichi Kamada (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Koki Ogawa (Japan).
Delay in match because of an injury Victor Lindelöf (Sweden).

events.description: 卡尔·斯塔费尔特 登场，维克多·林德洛夫 离场
本杰明·尼格伦 登场，加布里埃尔·古德蒙森 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Yukinari Sugawara (Japan).
Attempt saved. Anthony Elanga (Sweden) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Benjamin Nygren.

events.description: 埃兰加射正。 本杰明·尼格伦参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Yukinari Sugawara.
Attempt saved. Alexander Isak (Sweden) header from the left side of the six yard box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Yasin Ayari with a cross.

events.description: 伊萨克射门被封堵。 亚辛·阿亚里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.
